# LangChain v0.3 Released With Native MCP Support

LangChain version 0.3 introduces native Model Context Protocol (MCP) support, enabling direct integration with agent frameworks like OpenClaw. CEO Harrison Chase said the release represents a fundamental shift toward open agent interoperability. The update includes improved tool calling, streaming support, and a redesigned memory system. LangChain maintains its position as the most popular agent framework with 300+ integrations, competing with CrewAI and OpenAI Agents SDK.

**Key facts:** MCP native support, improved tool calling, streaming, 300+ integrations. **Impact:** MCP becomes the de facto standard for agent-tool communication.
